# Jesús Villar

> Bilingual portfolio for Jesús Villar, frontend developer and web designer.

The site is a portfolio in active growth focused on:
- Frontend development
- Web design
- Accessibility
- Performance
- Bilingual content architecture

Primary pages:
- https://jesusvillar.dev/
- https://jesusvillar.dev/projects/
- https://jesusvillar.dev/contact/
- https://jesusvillar.dev/es/
- https://jesusvillar.dev/es/projects/
- https://jesusvillar.dev/es/contact/

Profile:

- Role: Frontend developer and web designer

- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/jesusvillar

Notes:

- Existing project pages describe real work in web design and frontend development.
